mapper.insert:
SELECT ANNOUNCEMENT_SEQ.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ANNOUNCEMENT (ADMIN_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, TARGET_ROLE, IS_PINNED) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{targetRole}, #{isPinned})
mapper.select: SELECT A.*, U.NAME AS ADMIN_NAME FROM ANNOUNCEMENT A JOIN USERS U ON A.ADMIN_ID = U.ID WHERE A.ID = #{id} AND A.DELETED_AT IS NULL
SELECT A.*, U.NAME AS ADMIN_NAME FROM ANNOUNCEMENT A JOIN USERS U ON A.ADMIN_ID = U.ID WHERE A.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY A.IS_PINNED DESC, A.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT A.*, U.NAME AS ADMIN_NAME FROM ANNOUNCEMENT A JOIN USERS U ON A.ADMIN_ID = U.ID WHERE A.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND (A.TARGET_ROLE = 'ALL' OR A.TARGET_ROLE = #{targetRole}) ORDER BY A.IS_PINNED DESC, A.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ANNOUNCEMENT SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, TARGET_ROLE = #{targetRole}, IS_PINNED = #{isPinned}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE ANNOUNCEMENT SET DELETED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE ANNOUNCEMENT SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
